props.label: Do not delete or rename this layout!

This solution uses a naming convention for the layouts to drive the navigation matrix.  The layout delimiter is a dash -The naming convention is as follows: Module-Tab Name (No Spaces Around Dash)The default view state is used to store the view state in the navigation system.The system is designed to allow up to 16 modules.  Each module may have up to 16 tabs for each of the three view states: Form / List / Table
